expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with multiple user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Notification Center",
  "branchName": "notification-center",
  "description": "Add notification center with badges, list, read/unread state, filtering, and persistence.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add notifications schema and persistence",
      "description": "As a user, I want notifications stored so read state persists across sessions.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Add notifications table with read flag and timestamp",
        "Migrations apply and existing data unaffected",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["db/migrations/xxxx_create_notifications.sql", "src/models/notification.ts"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Backend API to fetch and update notifications",
      "description": "As a user, I want APIs to fetch notifications, mark read/unread, and clear read notifications.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "List endpoint returns notifications with read state",
        "Endpoints to mark read/unread and clear read notifications",
        "Tests for server behavior pass",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["src/routes/notifications.ts", "src/services/notificationService.ts"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Show unread badge in header",
      "description": "As a user, I want an unread badge on header icon so I know there are new notifications.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Header shows unread count badge when unread > 0",
        "Badge updates after marking notifications read",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["src/components/Header.tsx", "src/components/NotificationBadge.tsx"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Notification list UI with filters",
      "description": "As a user, I want to open a notification list and filter by read/unread state.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "List UI shows notifications, supports filter All/Unread/Read",
        "Infinite scroll or pagination for long lists",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["src/pages/NotificationsPage.tsx", "src/components/NotificationList.tsx"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Mark notification read/unread",
      "description": "As a user, I want to mark notifications read or unread so my read state is accurate.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Tapping mark read/unread calls backend and updates UI immediately",
        "Unread badge and counts update correctly",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["src/components/NotificationItem.tsx", "src/services/notificationService.ts"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Clear all read notifications",
      "description": "As a user, I want to clear all read notifications to reduce clutter.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Add Clear All Read action that removes read notifications",
        "Action confirms before destructive clear",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["src/pages/NotificationsPage.tsx", "src/services/notificationService.ts"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 6,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover persistence, badge or list UI, read-state updates, filtering, and clearing read notifications.
